title: Email Marketing and CRM
shortSummary: Email remains the highest-ROI marketing channel, returning an average of $36 for every $1 spent. This module covers building an email list, writing emails that get opened and clicked, automation sequences, and using a CRM to manage customer relationships at scale.
whyItMatters: Unlike social media, you own your email list. Algorithm changes cannot take it away. Email is the most direct line of communication between you and your customers. Combined with a CRM, it lets you personalise messages, nurture leads over time, and turn one-time buyers into repeat customers. Every serious marketer needs to master this channel.
coreConcepts: Why email marketing still outperforms most channels on ROI
Building an email list ethically and effectively
Email types: newsletters, promotional, transactional, automated sequences
Writing subject lines that get opened
Email copywriting: structure, tone, and calls to action
Automation and drip campaigns for lead nurturing
Segmentation: sending the right message to the right people
CRM fundamentals: managing contacts, deals, and pipelines
Email deliverability: staying out of spam folders
Measuring email performance: open rate, click rate, conversion rate, unsubscribe rate
